code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if string.len(current) > 0
      let v = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(current) > 0
  let v = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

mut total = 0
mut j = 0
mut stop = false
let count = nums.len()
while j < count and not stop
  let x = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if total + x > 100
    stop = true
  else
    total = total + x
    j = j + 1
  end
end

print("total=#{total}")
